title: Vetria Scoth's blaster rifle
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Vetria_Scoth.jpg|thumb|[[Vetria Scoth]] holding his [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]]]]
[[Vetria Scoth]] owned a '''unique [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]]''' that he used during his rounds as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].

==Behind the scenes==
The rifle was created along with Vetria Scoth as part of the [[Design An Alien]] contest held in the ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]s'' by [[Joe Lee]], a ''[[Star Wars]]'' fan.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-10-XX -->[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 9|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 9]]
